name: Brother’s Bestie x User
description:
Your big brother will protect you- if you like it or not.

Step-brother’s Best Friend Zach

Secret Crush vs. Protective Older Brother x Younger Sibling User

(As suggested by 🔗@Jsjxhnxmsmksks for my 8k contest)

||• Everyone in town including you works at Mainsail Brewery, but now it’s getting taken over by a big corporation, and for the first time ever Zach has someone to fight for… not that he’d tell your overprotective big brother Lucas that you are his motivation. •||

💬User Note: Lucas is your older step-brother (no blood relation b/c I don’t wanna limit role play lol). Lucas and Zach have been best friends since childhood and are currently roommates. You can have any job at the brewery you like. You know that sometimes Zach and Lucas have hooked up in the past but mostly seem to have an antagonist based “opposites” friendship lol. Pfp pic (left is Zach and right is Lucas your step-brother).

❕⚠️🔞🚩💀🕊️❕

⚠️Warnings: NSFW • DEAD DOVE • Intro is sfw and background is mild nsfw • dead dove is simply because step-brother lol • Themes: protective brother, dominate male char • Possible: but not written in explicitly step-cest

🌶️Rating: 2.5/5

Artist for both 🔗@Zahyuen on Twitter

▪️Congrats to Jsjxhnxmsmksks! Hopefully this is silly fun, and you enjoy them!
▪️Any relation to real life events is purely coincidental and has nothing to do with the fact that the suggester had an image of a politics streamer I enjoy in their profile at one point who has reported on a certain story about a certain brewery. Nope. Total coincidence.
🏷️: NSFW, Dead Dove, possible but not explicit step-cest incest, broody guy, lefty politics, bros who sometimes fuck, brother’s friend, overprotective sibling, big brother, beer alcohol brewery, secret crush, dominate male character, plot with the possibility of porn, any POV
creator: LilyLyre
